results.rendered_html:
prati-√nand P. -nandati, to greet cheerfully, salute (also in return), bid welcome or farewell, address kindly, favour, befriend,  AV.  &c. &c.;
to receive joyfully or thankfully, to accept willingly (with na, to decline, refuse, reject),  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Caus. -nandayati, to gladden, delight, gratify,  MBh. ;  Kām.
